hooks.command: ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -f "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/pre_commit_sync_local_agents.py" ]; then AGENT_CODEX_HOOK_SCOPE=project /usr/bin/python3 "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/pre_commit_sync_local_agents.py"; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking local agent sync before commit
